programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From a pinball human to 93kph speed skating
programme.desc: Speed skating into the record books at 93kph. Office skateboarding. BASE jumping on Mount Everest. Diving into crocodile waters. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from speed skating in Norway to BASE jumping from treacherous Mount Everest.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From skateboarding out a plane to 180m wall climb
programme.desc: Touring a town in style on a snowmobile. Freerunning through an airport. Skateboarding out of a flying plane. Ice climbing Niagra Falls. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from freerunning through an airport to building a skatepark in the forest.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From a paper plane contest to diving off ruins
programme.desc: Swamp buggy racing. Sprinting down from the peak of a mountain on a bike. High diving off ancient ruins. Getting the perfect surf shot. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from diving off ancient ruins to acing a paper plane competition.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: Prodigy on skis. Brilliant university student. Fashion icon. Witness the dazzling trajectory of a woman with roots in China and the US who is redefining what it means to be a modern sporting champion.
programme.series-desc: Witness the dazzling trajectory of a skier who's redefining what it means to be a modern champion.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: Marcel Hirscher – arguably the best male ski racer ever – has returned from retirement to attempt the mother of all comebacks. And he’s doing it under a new flag.
programme.series-desc: Arguably the best male ski racer has returned from retirement to attempt the mother of all comebacks.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: Spanish snowboarder Queralt Castellet shows that snowboarding is more than results – it’s about passion, resilience and freedom. Her fearless halfpipe style inspires the next generation of winter athletes.
programme.series-desc: Spanish snowboarder Queralt Castellet has competed since 2005 – and only gets better every season.

programme.title: Winter Heroes
programme.desc: With explosive and unpredictable runs, Alice Robinson is putting New Zealand on the podium in the traditionally European-dominated sport of alpine skiing. Discover a fearless athlete on the rise.
programme.series-desc: With explosive and unpredictable runs, Alice Robinson is putting New Zealand on the podium in alpine skiing.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From BASE jumping a cave to a flying mega swing
programme.desc: Wingsuit flying through London’s Tower Bridge at 246kph. Swinging from a hot air balloon. Slacklining the length of two football fields. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from slacklining the distance of two soccer fields to BASE jumping into a cave.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From skydiving with skis to flying into a volcano
programme.desc: Flying a plane 245kph through a tunnel. A wingsuit flight across the crater of an active volcano. A record-breaking truck jump in a ghost town. It's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes!
programme.series-desc: Red Bull athletes do it all, from wingsuit flying over an active volcano to skydiving on skis.

programme.title: For Reals
programme.sub-title: From F1 soapbox racing to breaking world records
programme.desc: Breaking world records – it's all in a day's work for Red Bull athletes! See Felix Baumgartner jump from space, 65 women skydive together and one BMXer conquer the globe's biggest full loop.
programme.series-desc: Breaking records: all in a day's work! See Baumgartner jump from space, 65 women skydive and a BMXer loop big.

programme.title: Au Revoir
programme.desc: A competitive family legacy, a brotherly rivalry that fuelled his rise, and a last act on the water. Au Revoir is the wakeboarding ride of a lifetime as Raph Derome retires from the competitive sport.
programme.series-desc: The story of wake-boarding champion Raph Derome as he retires from riding in front of crowds and cameras.

programme.title: Ice Waterfalls
programme.sub-title: Kayaking off the world's highest ice waterfall
programme.desc: Catalan adventurer and elite kayaker Aniol Serrasolses shatters boundaries on his Arctic expedition to Norway when he descends a 20m-high ice waterfall - the largest ever recorded kayak drop from a glacial waterfall.
programme.series-desc: Aniol Serrasolses pushes limits in Norway, kayaking down a 20m-high ice waterfall, the largest ever recorded.

programme.title: Chasing Winter
programme.sub-title: Snowboarding's best prepare for the world stage
programme.desc: Join Mark McMorris and friends as they push themselves and their sport in preparation for the biggest contest season of their careers at an idyllic training camp in Switzerland.
programme.series-desc: Pro snowboarder Mark McMorris and friends prepare for the upcoming high-stakes competition season.

programme.title: Yamnuska: The Ragged Edge
programme.sub-title: Explore the legacy of Canada's climbing icon, Mount Yamnuska
programme.desc: Follow modern-day adventurers Vikki Weldon and Quentin Roberts as they embark on a climbing journey through time, celebrating the rich history of one of Canada’s most iconic cliffs, Mount Yamnuska.
programme.series-desc: Vikki Weldon and Quentin Roberts explore the enduring legacy of rock climbing on Canada's Mount Yamnuska.

programme.title: Resilience
programme.desc: Follow Els Visser's journey from surviving a ship wreck to becoming a triathlon and Ironman athlete. description : How does surviving a ship wreck lead to someone becoming a successful triathlete? Learn about Els Visser's journey from medical student to sporting success via a life-threatening disaster at sea.
programme.series-desc: Follow Els Visser's journey from surviving a ship wreck to becoming a triathlon and Ironman athlete.

programme.title: Asa Vermette's Ascent
programme.sub-title: A rookie’s breakout year in downhill MTB
programme.desc: One of mountain biking’s most exciting young riders, Asa Vermette, has secured a Junior world title. Follow his journey as he faces downhill’s toughest race in his debut Red Bull Hardline season.
programme.series-desc: Follow Asa Vermette – one of mountain biking’s most exciting young riders – on his debut at Red Bull Hardline.

programme.title: Paved
programme.sub-title: An unfiltered snow odyssey two years in the making
programme.desc: Part history lesson, part hangout, part backcountry odyssey, Paved – a Burton and Red Bull Media House co-production – celebrates the passion and soul of snowboarding in raw, wry and light-hearted style.
programme.series-desc: Experience the joy as snowboarding’s elite push boundaries and chase podium dreams ahead of the 2026 season.

programme.title: Pressure Drop
programme.sub-title: Born from a dream, this is TGR’s 30th annual film
programme.desc: Follow the world’s best skiers and snowboarders in a cinematic ride through risk, beauty and the pursuit of perfection.
programme.series-desc: Follow elite skiers and snowboarders in a cinematic ride through risk, beauty and the pursuit of perfection.

programme.title: Paradigm
programme.sub-title: Mountain biking taken to new heights
programme.desc: From the precision of slopestyle to the massive airs of freeride and the raw speed of downhill, Thomas Genon, Szymon Godziek, Emil Johansson and Kade Edwards deliver raw MTB talent and nonstop action.
programme.series-desc: Thomas Genon, Szymon Godziek, Emil Johansson and Kade Edwards showcase raw MTB talent and nonstop action.

programme.title: After the Snowfall
programme.sub-title: A celebration of skiing in its purest form
programme.desc: Filmed in breath-taking locations around the world, Matchstick Productions bring us a celebration of skiing. Elite athletes and everyday skiers risk all to seek joy-filled moments in the mountains.
programme.series-desc: Elite skiers celebrate skiing’s soul, from deep powder to joy-filled moments around the world.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: We explore what has shifted in the climate crisis this year and the people driving the fight to protect the planet.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: A 13-year-old aspiring journalist investigates his father's murder in one of Kenya's largest wildlife conservation parks.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: Inside Story
programme.desc: Beyond the headlines to the heart of the news of the day. Al Jazeera gets the Inside Story from some of the best minds in the Middle East and beyond.

programme.title: Al Jazeera World
programme.sub-title: El Palestino - More Than A Club
programme.desc: The story of Chile's Palestino FC, where football, identity and resistance collide, and every match becomes a powerful act of Palestinian representation.
programme.series-desc:
A series of one-hour documentaries showcasing films from across the Al Jazeera Network.
English

programme.title: Newshour
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: America's first and longest running hour-long nightly news broadcast known for its in-depth coverage of issues and current events.

programme.title: News Live
programme.desc: Up-to-date news and analysis from around the world.
programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: The Stream is where Al Jazeera's audience becomes a global community.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: After al-Assad's fall, a lawyer uncovers files from a notorious prison that reveals the fate of Syria's disappeared.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Bottom Line
programme.desc: Can the Trump-brokered deal between DR Congo and Rwanda bring political and economic stability to the region?
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: The Listening Post
programme.desc: Netanyahu says his corruption trial endangers Israel and demands a pardon. Plus: is Kim Ou-Joon fixing South Korean media or breaking it?
programme.series-desc: Listening Post is Al Jazeera English's weekly media review show. It casts a critical eye over not just what gets reported, but how it's reported - covering the coverage of the news & analyzing global events through the prism of the media.

programme.title: Witness
programme.desc: After al-Assad's fall, a lawyer uncovers files from a notorious prison that reveals the fate of Syria's disappeared.
programme.series-desc: Yu Kyung is a successful woman who is proficient enough to become an executive director of Chunha Group when she started as a secretary. She recently found out her daughter is alive, so she plans to get her back and take her revenge. Meanwhile, Hye Soo is a strong girl who faces challenges head-on. She has a daughter with Ji Ho, and she would do anything for her. However, she gets tragically betrayed by Ji Ho, the love of her life, over power and money. How will those two mothers end their fierce revenge?

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.

programme.series-desc: A news show hosted by Kiryu Coco in which she summarizes the events of the day before. Coco-Kaichou often pitches products as commercial breaks such as her drug AsaCoco which can be inhaled, injected or consumed as a drink. It is tradition to watch Cocos AsaCoco Live News and afterwards Tsunomaki Watames "Watame no Uta" (early morning karaoke format with viewer rock-paper-scissor).

programme.title: The Bottom Line
programme.desc: Can the Trumpian style of peacemaking - long on ceremony, short on substance – achieve a lasting peace between Russia & Ukraine?
programme.series-desc: The Bottom Line is a business discussion programme broadcast in the UK on BBC Radio 4 and the BBC News Channel, and internationally on the BBC World Service and BBC World News. It is co-production between BBC News and The Open University.

programme.title: The Stream
programme.desc: Powered by social media, The Stream brings fresh perspectives and new voices, beyond the headlines.
programme.series-desc:
The Stream is a daily television programme on Al Jazeera English. It is branded as a “Web community With a Global TV show”. On television and online The Stream taps into the extraordinary potential of social media to disseminate news. The Stream is an aggregator of online sources and discussion, seeking out unheard voices, new perspectives from people on the ground and untold angles related to the most compelling stories of the day.
Previously, the show was hosted by Derrick Ashong and Imran Garda. Lisa Fletcher replaced them as the new presenter. On June 25, 2012, the Stream was relaunched with a new studio and opening graphics. Femi Oke replaced Fletcher when Fletcher was picked to host a version of The Stream on Al Jazeera America.
